title: Fix sound playback — BGM and click/tap sounds not playing

requirements.text: Fix the background music (BGM) so it reliably starts playing when the user enters the Dashboard page. Ensure the useBGM hook correctly loads and plays the audio file, handles autoplay policy by resuming on first user interaction, and that the FloatingMusicControl component reflects the correct play/pause state.

quotes: Why the sound is not coming. plz play the sounds

acceptanceCriteria: Background music begins playing on the Dashboard page after the first user interaction (click or tap).
The FloatingMusicControl button correctly shows the playing state when music is active.
Pausing and resuming via the FloatingMusicControl works without errors.
No console errors related to audio playback or missing audio files.

requirements.text: Fix the click/tap sound effects so they play on every user interaction across all pages. The useDoubleKnockSound hook (used in RootLayout) and any page-specific sounds (e.g., hello sound in ChatPage, unlock sound in LockScreen, OurMemoriesPage audio) must correctly load their audio files, respect browser autoplay restrictions by triggering only on user gesture, and not throw errors when audio is unavailable.

quotes: Why the sound is not coming. plz play the sounds

acceptanceCriteria: A click/tap sound plays on every click or tap interaction throughout the app.
Page-specific sounds (chat hello sound, lock screen unlock sound, memories page audio) play correctly on their respective triggers.
Audio files are correctly referenced with valid public asset paths.
No 404 errors for audio files in the browser network tab.
Sound hooks gracefully handle cases where audio cannot be played (e.g., permission denied) without crashing the app.

requirements.text: Audit all audio file references across hooks and pages (useBGM.ts, useDoubleKnockSound.ts, useClickSound.ts, ChatPage.tsx, LockScreen.tsx, OurMemoriesPage.tsx) and ensure every referenced audio file exists in the correct public assets directory. Replace any missing or broken audio files with working alternatives or synthesize sounds via the Web Audio API where appropriate.

quotes: Why the sound is not coming. plz play the sounds

acceptanceCriteria: All audio file paths used in hooks and pages resolve to existing files.
If a file is missing, it is either added to public assets or replaced with a Web Audio API synthesized equivalent.
No 404 network errors for any audio resource.

constraints: Do not modify files in frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui.
Do not alter backend logic or data models.
Preserve the existing Doraemon theme and visual design.
nonGoals: Adding new sound effects not already present in the app.
Changing the visual design or layout.
